top.name: Eldritch Catalyst
top.rules_text: Your next spell this turn also hits 1 additional enemy (nearest within 2).

bottom.name: Charge Siphon
bottom.rules_text: Deal 4 damage. Gain 1 charge per buff on the target (min 1).

upgrades.description: Catalyst's splash reaches further. Siphon hits harder.

changes.value: Your next spell this turn also hits 1 additional enemy (nearest within 3).
Deal 6 damage. Gain 1 charge per buff on the target (min 1).

upgrades.description: Forking Catalyst: the splash deals full damage, not half.

changes.value: Your next spell this turn also hits 1 additional enemy at full damage (nearest within 3).

upgrades.description: Greedy Siphon: floors at 2 charge regardless of buffs.

changes.value: Deal 6 damage. Gain 1 charge per buff on the target (min 2).

upgrades.description: Chain Catalyst: the next spell hits 2 additional enemies.

changes.value: Your next spell this turn also hits 2 additional enemies at full damage (within 3).

upgrades.description: Mind Siphon: also strips a buff from the target.

changes.value: Deal 6 damage. Gain 1 charge per buff (min 2). Remove a buff from the target.

upgrades.description: Eldritch Cascade: the next spell hits 3 additional enemies and the catalyst is free.

changes.value: Your next spell this turn also hits 3 additional enemies at full damage (within 3).

upgrades.description: Soul Siphon: drains harder and refunds mana.

changes.value: Deal 8 damage. Gain 1 charge per buff (min 3). Steal 1 mana.
